articles.description: Igor Tudor's Spurs tenure could already be on the line after a disastrous defeat against Atletico Madrid in the Champions League, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.
articles.title: Is Tudor's Spurs reign almost up after only four games?

articles.description: Tottenham replace goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky in the 17th minute after conceding three goals inside the opening quarter of an hour of the Champions League last-16 tie at Atletico Madrid.
articles.title: Antonin Kinsky: Spurs replace keeper after conceding three goals inside 15 minutes

articles.description: Eddie Howe's Newcastle were so close to a famous European victory, but now face a herculean second-leg task after Lamine Yamal's late penalty.
articles.title: Champions League: Newcastle's sense of missed opportunity after late Barca blow

articles.description: England head coach Steve Borthwick says the shirt has "weighed heavy" on some of his players at times in a disappointing Six Nations campaign.
articles.title: Steve Borthwick admits pressure has hit England's Six Nations campaign

articles.description: Michael Olise shines in the absence of Harry Kane as Bayern Munich thrash Atalanta in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie.
articles.title: Atalanta 1-6 Bayern Munich: Michael Olise scores twice as Germans win with Harry Kane an unused sub

articles.description: World number one Aryna Sabalenka eases into the quarter-finals at Indian Wells with a 6-2 6-4 victory over Naomi Osaka.
articles.title: Indian Wells: Aryna Sabalenka into quarter-finals with 6-2 6-4 win over Naomi Osaka

articles.description: Thousands of Brits have travelled to Costa Blanca to enjoy Cheltenham Festival, the pinnacle event of the jump-racing calendar.
articles.title: Cheltenham Festival 2026: The Brits who watch the racing in Benidorm

articles.description: Experienced England defender Kyle Walker retires from international football with immediate effect.
articles.title: Kyle Walker: Burnley defender retires from international football after winning 96 caps for England

articles.description: Arne Slot's 100th game in charge of Liverpool ends in defeat after Galatasaray establish a narrow last-16 Champions League lead to take to Anfield.
articles.title: Galatasaray 1-0 Liverpool: Reds beaten in Arne Slot's 100th game in charge

articles.description: Scotland head coach Gregor Townsend faces the most significant team selection of his long reign before Saturday's Six Nations trip to Dublin, writes BBC Scotland's chief sports writer Tom English.
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: Scotland head coach Gregor Townsend faces dilemmas before his 'most significant' selection
